articles.title: Ancient Visitor From Space: Comet 3I/ATLAS May Be 12 Billion Years Old
articles.summary: Scientists have made a remarkable discovery about comet 3I/ATLAS, a space rock that is travelling through our solar system from somewhere else in the galaxy. Researchers believe this interstellar visitor formed between 10 and 12 billion years ago inside a very old planetary system — long before our own solar system even existed. What makes it extra special is that its chemical make-up is completely different from anything we have found in our own solar neighbourhood. Astronomers around the world are continuing to study 3I/ATLAS closely to learn more about how planets and comets formed in the early universe.

lv1: What is the name of the interstellar comet that scientists are studying? (科學家正在研究的星際彗星叫什麼名字？)
How old do scientists think comet 3I/ATLAS is? (科學家認為彗星3I/ATLAS有多少歲？)
lv2: Why is comet 3I/ATLAS considered special compared to other comets in our solar system? (為什麼彗星3I/ATLAS被認為比太陽系內其他彗星更特別？)
How do scientists figure out how old a comet is and where it came from? (科學家如何判斷彗星的年齡及其來源？)
lv3: What does the discovery of an interstellar comet with a completely different chemical composition tell us about the diversity of planetary systems across the universe? (發現一顆化學成分截然不同的星際彗星，對我們理解宇宙中行星系統的多樣性有什麼啟示？)

Should governments invest more public funding into studying interstellar objects, or should this be left to private space companies? What are the arguments on both sides? (政府應否投入更多公共資金研究星際天體，還是應交由私人太空公司負責？兩方各有什麼論點？)

articles.title: Hong Kong Airport Runs Major Typhoon Drill to Get Ready for Storm Season
articles.summary: Hong Kong International Airport recently held a large-scale emergency exercise called 'Summer Blow 2026' to prepare for the upcoming typhoon season. Nearly 700 people from about 30 different organisations took part, including airport staff, government officers, and airline workers. The drill simulated a typhoon getting stronger and stronger until the most serious Signal Number 10 was raised. Teams practised managing crowds in both Terminal 1 and Terminal 2, handling luggage during disruptions, and carrying out safety checks on the airfield. The goal was to make sure that passengers stay safe and that the airport can keep running even during the worst storms.

lv1: What was the name of the typhoon drill held at Hong Kong airport? (香港機場舉行的颱風演習叫什麼名字？)
How many people took part in the 'Summer Blow 2026' drill? (有多少人參與「夏日狂吹2026」演習？)
lv2: Why is it important for an airport to practise what to do during a typhoon before one actually arrives? (為什麼機場在颱風真正來臨之前進行演習很重要？)
What kinds of problems might a real Signal No. 10 typhoon cause for an airport, and how did the drill help staff prepare? (真正的十號風球可能會為機場帶來什麼問題？演習如何幫助員工做好準備？)
lv3: As climate change makes typhoons potentially more frequent and powerful, should Hong Kong invest in making airport infrastructure permanently stronger, or is regular drilling enough? Give reasons for your view. (隨著氣候變化可能令颱風更頻繁、更強烈，香港應否投資將機場基礎設施永久加固，還是定期演習已經足夠？請說明你的理由。)

Some people argue that keeping airports open during typhoons puts workers at risk. Others say closures cause too much economic disruption. How should authorities balance safety and economic needs? (有人認為颱風期間維持機場運作會令員工面臨危險，但也有人認為關閉機場會造成過大的經濟損失。當局應如何平衡安全與經濟需要？)

articles.title: 機場劫金案：13人被捕，四人深圳落網，700萬元金條仍下落不明
articles.summary: 香港國際機場早前發生一宗搶劫金條案件，警方經調查後共逮捕13名男女疑犯，其中4人在深圳被捕後已移交香港警方處理。然而，案中涉及的約700萬元金條至今仍未尋回，警方正繼續追查金條下落及案件背後的犯罪網絡。事件引起社會廣泛關注，促使各界重新審視機場保安措施是否足夠完善，以防範類似的嚴重罪案再次發生。

lv1: 今次機場劫金案中，警方共逮捕了多少名疑犯？
被搶走的金條估計價值多少港元？
lv2: 為什麼今次案件需要深圳警方協助逮捕疑犯？這反映出什麼樣的跨境執法合作？
如果大量貴重貨物在機場遭竊，對香港作為國際航空貨運中心的聲譽有什麼影響？
lv3: 有人認為應在機場加裝更多監控設備以打擊罪案，但也有人擔心這會侵害個人私隱。你認為保安與私隱之間應如何取得平衡？
香港與內地的執法合作在今次案件中發揮了關鍵作用。你認為加強兩地警務合作對香港市民有什麼利與弊？

articles.title: 日本南部海面同時出現兩個颱風，預料周末相繼靠近日本
articles.summary: 日本南部海面近日同時形成第7號及第8號兩個颱風，氣象專家形容為「雙颱風」現象。預測顯示，其中一個強颱風將於本週末逐漸靠近日本，當局已呼籲沿海及低窪地區居民提高警覺，做好防風防洪準備。氣象學家指出，夏季颱風季節正式展開，今年受全球暖化及厄爾尼諾現象影響，颱風活動可能較以往活躍，市民應密切留意最新天氣消息。

lv1: 今次在日本南部海面同時出現了多少個颱風？
氣象學家認為今年颱風活動較活躍的原因是什麼？
lv2: 「雙颱風」現象對日本沿岸居民的日常生活及防災準備有什麼影響？
全球暖化如何影響颱風的形成頻率和強度？
lv3: 面對颱風等極端天氣事件日趨頻繁，政府、企業和個人各自應承擔什麼責任來減低氣候變化的影響？
有意見認為媒體過度渲染颱風消息會引起不必要的社會恐慌，但也有人認為廣泛報道有助提高公眾防災意識。你認為媒體應如何報道天災新聞？
